creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
pyreverse is a part of pylint since a long time ago. It no more exists as single project. It unmaintained and nobody in the tree depends on it, so it's safe to mark it deprecated and remove in one month.

From offsite (http://www.logilab.org/2560/): 
"""
state: active development -> moved
PyReverse is now included in the pylint_ distribution.
homepage	http://www.logilab.org/project/pylint
"""

User should be suggested to use devel/pylint instead.
